```text
410	  position: relative;

412	.category-card:hover { background: var(--bg-elev); }
413	.category-rule {
414	  width: 4px;
415	  flex-shrink: 0;
416	  align-self: stretch;
417	}
418	.category-card-body {
419	  padding: 18px 20px;
420	  flex: 1;
421	  display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px;
422	}
423	.category-card-head { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }
424	.category-name {
425	  margin: 0;
426	  font-family: 'Noto Serif TC', serif;
427	  font-size: 20px;
428	  font-weight: 700;
429	  color: var(--text);
430	  line-height: 1.3;
431	}
432	.category-count {
433	  font-size: 13.5px;
434	  color: var(--text-mute);
435	  letter-spacing: 0.3px;
436	  font-family: 'Source Sans 3', sans-serif;
437	}
438	.category-topics {
439	  list-style: none;
440	  padding: 0; margin: 0;
441	  display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 4px 10px;
442	  font-size: 14.5px;
443	  color: var(--text-soft);
444	  min-height: 42px;
445	}
446	.category-topics li::before {
447	  content: '·';
448	  margin-right: 4px;
449	  color: var(--text-mute);
450	}
451	.category-topics li:first-child::before { content: ''; margin: 0; }
452	.category-stats {
453	  display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline;
454	  margin-top: auto;
455	  padding-top: 12px;
456	  border-top: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
457	  font-family: 'Source Sans 3', sans-serif;
458	  font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
459	}
460	.category-stats > span:first-child { font-size: 23px; font-weight: 700; }
461	.category-stats .amt { font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-mute); }
462	
463	@media (max-width: 720px) {
464	  .landing-title { font-size: 30px; }
465	  .landing-lede { font-size: 15px; }
466	  .landing-meta { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 20px; }
467	}
468	
469	/* ─────── HERO（舊）保留給其他頁用 ─────── */
470	.hero {
471	  padding: 40px 0 32px;
472	  margin-bottom: 32px;
473	  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
474	}
475	.hero h1 {
476	  margin: 0 0 10px;
477	  font-size: 32px; font-weight: 700;
478	  color: var(--text);
479	  letter-spacing: 0;
480	  line-height: 1.3;
481	}
482	.hero h1 small {
483	  font-weight: 400; font-size: 15px;
484	  color: var(--text-mute);
485	  margin-left: 16px;
486	  font-family: 'Source Sans 3', sans-serif;
487	}
488	.hero p {
489	  margin: 0; color: var(--text-soft);
490	  font-size: 15px;
491	  max-width: 820px;
492	  line-height: 1.75;
493	}
494	
495	.topic-hero {
496	  padding: 40px 0 32px;
497	  margin-bottom: 32px;
498	  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
499	  border-left: 3px solid var(--accent);
500	  padding-left: 20px;
501	}
502	.topic-hero-inner { max-width: 960px; }
503	.category-tag {
504	  display: inline-block;
505	  padding: 4px 12px;
506	  border-radius: 20px;
507	  font-size: 12px;
508	  font-weight: 600;
509	  margin-bottom: 12px;
510	}
511	.topic-hero h1 {
512	  margin: 0 0 6px;
513	  font-size: 34px;
514	  color: var(--text);
515	  font-weight: 700;
516	  letter-spacing: 0;
517	  line-height: 1.25;
518	}
519	.topic-hero h1 small { color: var(--text-mute); font-size: 17px; font-weight: 400; font-family: 'Source Sans 3', sans-serif; }
520	.topic-en {
521	  margin: 0 0 16px;
522	  color: var(--text-mute);
523	  font-size: 13px;
524	  letter-spacing: 1px;
525	  text-transform: uppercase;
526	}
527	.topic-desc {
528	  margin: 0 0 20px;
529	  color: var(--text-soft);
530	  font-size: 15px;
531	  line-height: 1.7;
532	}
533	.topic-kpis {
534	  display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 24px;
535	  padding-top: 16px;
536	  border-top: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
537	}
538	.topic-kpis .kpi {
539	  display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px;
540	}
541	.topic-kpis em {
542	  font-style: normal; color: var(--text-mute);
543	  font-size: 12px;
544	}
545	.topic-kpis strong {
546	  font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700;
547	}
548	
549	/* ─────── BREADCRUMB ─────── */
550	.breadcrumb {
551	  padding: 8px 0 16px;
552	  font-size: 13px;
553	  color: var(--text-mute);
554	}
555	.breadcrumb a:hover { color: var(--accent); }
556	
557	/* ─────── STAT GRID ─────── */
558	.stat-grid {
559	  display: grid;
560	  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
561	  gap: 16px;
562	  margin-bottom: 24px;
563	}
564	.stat-card {
565	  background: var(--bg-elev);
566	  border: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
567	  border-radius: var(--radius);
568	  padding: 18px 20px;
569	}
570	.stat-label {
571	  font-size: 12px;
572	  color: var(--text-mute);
573	  letter-spacing: 0.3px;
574	  margin-bottom: 8px;
575	}
576	.stat-value {
577	  font-size: 28px; font-weight: 800;
578	  color: var(--text);
579	  line-height: 1.1;
580	}
581	.stat-value small {
582	  font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-mute);
583	  margin-left: 6px;
584	}
585	.stat-sub {
586	  font-size: 12px;
587	  color: var(--text-mute);
588	  margin-top: 6px;
589	}
590	
591	/* ─────── INDICATOR GRID (題材頁 4 個指標卡) ─────── */
592	.indicator-grid {
593	  display: grid;
594	  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
595	  gap: 16px;
596	  margin-bottom: 24px;
597	}
598	.indicator-card {
599	  background: var(--bg-elev);
600	  border: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
601	  border-radius: var(--radius);
602	  padding: 16px 20px;
603	  display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px;
604	}
605	.indicator-card small {
606	  color: var(--text-mute);
607	  font-size: 11px;
608	  letter-spacing: 0.4px;
609	  text-transform: uppercase;
610	}
611	.indicator-card strong {
612	  font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700;
613	  color: var(--text);
614	}
615	
616	/* ─────── GRID 2 COL ─────── */
617	.grid-2col {
618	  display: grid;
619	  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
620	  gap: 16px;
621	  margin-bottom: 24px;
622	}
623	@media (max-width: 960px) {
624	  .grid-2col, .stat-grid, .indicator-grid {
625	    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
626	  }
627	  .header-inner { grid-template-columns: auto auto; row-gap: 12px; }
628	  .primary-nav { grid-column: 1 / -1; justify-self: stretch; overflow-x: auto; }
629	  .search-box { grid-column: 1 / -1; min-width: 0; }
630	}
631	
632	/* ─────── PANEL ─────── */
633	.panel {
634	  background: var(--bg);
635	  border: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
636	  border-radius: var(--radius);
637	  overflow: visible;  /* 讓 tooltip 能脫出 panel */
638	  margin-bottom: 20px;
639	  box-shadow: var(--shadow);
640	  position: relative;
641	}
642	.panel-header {
643	  padding: 16px 22px;
644	  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
645	  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
646	}
647	.panel-header h2 {
648	  margin: 0;
649	  font-size: 18.5px; font-weight: 700;
650	  color: var(--text);
651	  letter-spacing: 0;
652	}
653	.muted { color: var(--text-mute); font-size: 14px; }
654	
655	/* ─────── 技術分析工具列 ─────── */
656	.tech-toolbar {
657	  display: flex; gap: 4px; justify-content: flex-end;
658	  padding: 6px 12px 0;
659	}
660	.tech-toolbar .tf-btn {
661	  padding: 5px 14px;
662	  background: var(--bg);
663	  border: 1px solid var(--border);
664	  border-radius: 2px;
665	  color: var(--text-soft);
666	  cursor: pointer;
667	  font-size: 13px;
668	  font-weight: 500;
669	  font-family: 'Source Sans 3', sans-serif;
670	  transition: all 0.12s;
671	}
672	.tech-toolbar .tf-btn:hover {
673	  border-color: var(--accent);
674	  color: var(--accent);
675	}
676	.tech-toolbar .tf-btn.active {
677	  background: var(--accent);
678	  border-color: var(--accent);
679	  color: #fff;
680	}
681	
682	/* ─────── TABLE ─────── */
683	.table {
684	  width: 100%;
685	  border-collapse: collapse;
686	  font-size: 15px;
687	}
688	.table th {
689	  padding: 12px 14px;
690	  text-align: left;
691	  color: var(--text-mute);
692	  font-weight: 600;
693	  font-size: 13.5px;
694	  letter-spacing: 0.2px;
695	  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
696	  background: var(--bg-elev);
697	  font-family: 'Source Sans 3', sans-serif;
698	}
699	.table td {
700	  padding: 12px 14px;
701	  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
702	}
703	.table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }
704	.table tr:hover td { background: var(--bg-elev); }
705	.table.compact td, .table.compact th { padding: 9px 12px; font-size: 14px; }
706	
707	.positive { color: #dc2626 !important; font-weight: 600; }  /* 台股：紅漲 */
708	.negative { color: #059669 !important; font-weight: 600; }  /* 台股：綠跌 */
709	
710	/* ─────── CHIPS / BADGES ─────── */
711	.topic-chip {
712	  display: inline-block;
713	  padding: 3px 10px;
714	  border: 1px solid;
715	  border-radius: 2px;
716	  font-size: 13.5px;
717	  font-weight: 600;
718	  transition: all 0.15s;
719	}
720	.topic-chip:hover { background: currentColor; color: #fff !important; }
721	
722	.tag {
723	  display: inline-block;
724	  padding: 2px 8px;
725	  margin: 2px 2px 2px 0;
726	  background: var(--bg-elev);
727	  border-radius: 2px;
728	  font-size: 12px;
729	  color: var(--text-soft);
730	  border: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
731	}
732	.tag-more {
733	  position: relative;
734	  cursor: help;
735	  background: var(--bg);
736	  color: var(--accent-dark);
737	  border-color: var(--accent-dark);
738	  font-weight: 600;
739	}
740	.tag-more:hover {
741	  background: var(--accent-dark);
742	  color: #fff;
743	}
744	/* ───── 自繪 tooltip（data-tip 屬性） ───── */
745	.tag-more[data-tip]:hover::before,
746	.tag-more[data-tip]:hover::after {
747	  opacity: 1;
748	  pointer-events: none;
749	}
750	.tag-more[data-tip]::after {
751	  content: attr(data-tip);
752	  position: absolute;
753	  bottom: calc(100% + 8px);
754	  left: 50%;
755	  transform: translateX(-50%);
756	  padding: 7px 11px;
757	  background: #111827;
758	  color: #fff;
759	  font-size: 12px;
760	  font-weight: 500;
761	  line-height: 1.5;
762	  white-space: nowrap;
763	  max-width: 320px;
764	  border-radius: 4px;
765	  box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
766	  opacity: 0;
767	  transition: opacity 0.12s;
768	  z-index: 1000;
769	  text-align: center;
770	}
771	.tag-more[data-tip]::before {
772	  content: '';
773	  position: absolute;
774	  bottom: calc(100% + 3px);
775	  left: 50%;
776	  transform: translateX(-50%);
777	  border: 5px solid transparent;
778	  border-top-color: #111827;
779	  opacity: 0;
780	  transition: opacity 0.12s;
781	  z-index: 1000;
782	}
783	.tag-industry {
784	  background: var(--bg);
785	  color: var(--text-mute);
786	  font-style: normal;
787	  border-style: dashed;
788	}
789	
790	.badge {
791	  display: inline-block;
792	  padding: 2px 7px;
793	  border-radius: 2px;
794	  font-size: 12px;
795	  font-weight: 700;
796	}
797	.badge-red { background: #fee2e2; color: #b91c1c; border: 1px solid #fca5a5; }
798	.badge-green { background: #d1fae5; color: #047857; border: 1px solid #6ee7b7; }
799	
800	.pill {
801	  display: inline-block;
802	  padding: 3px 11px;
803	  border-radius: 20px;
804	  font-size: 13px;
805	  font-weight: 600;
806	  white-space: nowrap;
807	}
808	
809	/* ─────── BAR LIST ─────── */
810	.bar-list { padding: 8px 0; }
811	.bar-row {
812	  display: grid;
813	  grid-template-columns: 140px 1fr 80px;
814	  gap: 12px; align-items: center;
815	  padding: 9px 22px;
816	  transition: background 0.1s;
817	}
818	.bar-row:hover { background: var(--bg-elev); }
819	.bar-label { font-size: 14px; color: var(--text); font-weight: 500; }
820	.bar-track {
821	  height: 7px;
822	  background: var(--bg-elev-2);
823	  border-radius: 2px;
824	  overflow: hidden;
825	  position: relative;
826	}
827	.bar-fill { display: block; height: 100%; border-radius: 2px; transition: width 0.3s; }
828	.bar-value { text-align: right; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-soft); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
829	
830	/* ─────── SNAPSHOT ─────── */
831	.snapshot {
832	  display: grid;
833	  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
834	  gap: 0;
835	  padding: 4px 0;
836	}
837	.snapshot > div {
838	  padding: 16px 20px;
839	  display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px;
840	  border-right: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
841	  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
842	}
843	.snapshot > div:nth-child(4n) { border-right: none; }
844	.snapshot > div:nth-last-child(-n+4) { border-bottom: none; }
845	.snapshot em { font-style: normal; color: var(--text-mute); font-size: 12px; }
846	.snapshot strong { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; }
847	@media (max-width: 760px) {
848	  .snapshot { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
849	  .snapshot > div:nth-child(2n) { border-right: none; }
850	  .snapshot > div:nth-child(4n) { border-right: 1px solid var(--border-soft); }
851	}
852	
853	/* ─────── RELATED CHIPS ─────── */
854	.related-list {
855	  padding: 16px 20px;
856	  display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px;
857	}
858	.related-chip {
859	  display: inline-flex; flex-direction: column;
860	  padding: 8px 14px;
861	  border: 1px solid;
862	  border-radius: 10px;
863	  font-size: 13px;
864	  font-weight: 600;
865	  transition: all 0.15s;
866	}
867	.related-chip small {
868	  font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; opacity: 0.7; margin-top: 2px;
869	}
870	.related-chip:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); }
871	
872	/* ─────── TOPIC GRID (卡片) ─────── */
873	.topic-grid {
874	  display: grid;
875	  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(300px, 1fr));
876	  gap: 16px;
877	}
878	.topic-grid.compact {
879	  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(260px, 1fr));
880	}
881	.topic-card {
882	  background: var(--bg);
883	  border: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
884	  border-radius: var(--radius);
885	  overflow: hidden;
886	  display: flex; flex-direction: column;
887	  transition: all 0.15s;
888	  box-shadow: var(--shadow);
889	}
890	.topic-card:hover {
891	  transform: translateY(-2px);
892	  border-color: var(--border);
893	  box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
894	}
895	.topic-card-accent {
896	  height: 3px; background: var(--accent);
897	}
898	.topic-card-body {
899	  padding: 16px 18px;
900	  display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px;
901	  flex: 1;
902	}
903	.topic-card-header {
904	  display: flex; align-items: flex-start;
905	  justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px;
906	}
907	.topic-card-header h3 {
908	  margin: 0; font-size: 18.5px; font-weight: 700;
909	  color: var(--text);
910	}
911	.topic-card-desc {
912	  margin: 0; color: var(--text-soft);
913	  font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.7;
914	  flex: 1;
915	}
916	.topic-card-stats {
917	  display: grid;
918	  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
919	  gap: 10px;
920	  padding-top: 12px;
921	  border-top: 1px solid var(--border-soft);
922	}
923	.topic-card-stats > div { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 3px; }
924	.stat-mini-label {
925	  font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-mute);
926	  letter-spacing: 0.3px; text-transform: uppercase;
927	}
928	.stat-mini-value {
929	  font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text);
930	}
931	
932	/* ─────── FILTER BAR ─────── */
933	.filter-bar {
934	  display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px;
935	  margin-bottom: 20px;
936	}
937	.filter-chip {
938	  padding: 7px 16px;
939	  background: var(--bg);
940	  border: 1px solid var(--border);
941	  border-radius: 2px;
942	  color: var(--text-soft);
943	  cursor: pointer;
944	  font-size: 14.5px;
945	  font-weight: 500;
946	  transition: all 0.15s;
947	}
948	.filter-chip:hover { color: var(--text); border-color: var(--text-mute); }
949	.filter-chip.active {
950	  background: var(--text);
951	  color: #fff;
952	  border-color: var(--text);
953	  font-weight: 700;
954	}
955	
956	/* ─────── STOCK HIGHLIGHT（技術亮點 / 排名）─────── */
957	.highlight-panel {
958	  border-left: 3px solid var(--accent);
959	}
960	.highlight-body {
961	  padding: 18px 22px 20px;
962	}
963	.highlight-ranking {
964	  font-family: 'Noto Serif TC', serif;
965	  font-size: 22px;
966	  font-weight: 700;
967	  color: var(--accent-dark);
968	  margin-bottom: 14px;
969	  letter-spacing: 0;
970	}
971	.highlight-tech,
972	.highlight-moat {
973	  margin: 6px 0;
974	  color: var(--text-soft);
975	  line-height: 1.75;
976	  font-size: 14px;
977	}
978	.highlight-tech strong,
979	.highlight-moat strong {
980	  color: var(--text);
981	  font-weight: 600;
982	  margin-right: 6px;
983	}
984	.hl-star {
985	  display: inline-block;
986	  margin-left: 6px;
987	  color: var(--accent);
988	  font-size: 13px;
989	  cursor: help;
990	  position: relative;
991	  font-weight: 700;
992	}
993	.hl-star[data-tip]::after {
994	  content: attr(data-tip);
995	  position: absolute;
996	  bottom: calc(100% + 8px);
997	  left: 50%;
998	  transform: translateX(-50%);
999	  padding: 8px 12px;
1000	  background: #111827;
1001	  color: #fff;
1002	  font-size: 12px;
1003	  font-weight: 500;
1004	  line-height: 1.6;
1005	  white-space: normal;
1006	  width: max-content;
1007	  max-width: 360px;
1008	  border-radius: 4px;
1009	  box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
1010	  opacity: 0;
1011	  transition: opacity 0.12s;
1012	  z-index: 1000;
1013	  text-align: left;
1014	  pointer-events: none;
1015	}
1016	.hl-star[data-tip]:hover::after { opacity: 1; }
1017	.hl-star[data-tip]::before {
1018	  content: '';
1019	  position: absolute;
1020	  bottom: calc(100% + 3px);
1021	  left: 50%;
1022	  transform: translateX(-50%);
1023	  border: 5px solid transparent;
1024	  border-top-color: #111827;
1025	  opacity: 0;
1026	  transition: opacity 0.12s;
1027	  z-index: 1000;
1028	  pointer-events: none;
1029	}
1030	.hl-star[data-tip]:hover::before { opacity: 1; }
1031	
1032	/* ─────── TOPIC CHART KPI ─────── */
1033	.topic-chart-kpis {
1034	  display: flex; gap: 36px; flex-wrap: wrap;
1035	  padding: 14px 20px 4px;
1036	}
1037	.topic-chart-kpis > div {
1038	  display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px;
1039	}
1040	.topic-chart-kpis small {
1041	  color: var(--text-mute); font-size: 12px;
1042	}
1043	.topic-chart-kpis strong {
```

```text
1	{% extends "base.html" %}
2	{% set page = "topics" %}
3	{% set static_prefix = "../" %}
4	{% block title %}{{ group }} · 台股 AI 產業寶{% endblock %}
5	
6	{% block content %}
7	<nav class="breadcrumb">
8	  <a href="../index.html">每日焦點</a> ›
9	  <a href="../topics.html">題材總覽</a> ›
10	  <span style="color:{{ meta.color }};">{{ group }}</span>
11	</nav>
12	
13	<section class="topic-hero" style="--accent:{{ meta.color }};">
14	  <div class="topic-hero-inner">
15	    <div class="category-tag" style="background:{{ meta.color }}22; color:{{ meta.color }};">{{ meta.category }}</div>
16	    <h1>{{ group }}</h1>
17	    <p class="topic-en">{{ meta.en }}</p>
18	    <p class="topic-desc">{{ meta.desc }}</p>
19	    <div class="topic-kpis">
20	      <span class="kpi"><em>CAGR</em><strong>{{ meta.cagr }}</strong></span>
21	      <span class="kpi"><em>市場規模</em><strong>{{ meta.market_size }}</strong></span>
22	      <span class="kpi"><em>成分股</em><strong>{{ summary.n_stocks or 0 }}</strong></span>
23	      <span class="kpi"><em>今日平均</em><strong class="{% if summary.ret_1d_mean and summary.ret_1d_mean > 0 %}positive{% elif summary.ret_1d_mean %}negative{% endif %}">{{ summary.ret_1d_mean|pct if summary.ret_1d_mean else '—' }}</strong></span>
24	    </div>
25	  </div>
26	</section>
27	
28	<section class="indicator-grid">
29	  {% for ind in meta.indicators %}
30	  <div class="indicator-card">
31	    <small>{{ ind.label }}</small>
32	    <strong>{{ ind.value }}</strong>
33	  </div>
34	  {% endfor %}
35	</section>
36	
37	<section class="panel">
38	  <div class="panel-header">
39	    <h2>概念股報酬走勢</h2>
40	    <span class="muted">等權重投組 · 近 6 個月</span>
41	  </div>
42	  <div class="topic-chart-kpis" id="topic_chart_kpis_{{ group|slugify }}"></div>
43	  <div id="topic_chart_{{ group|slugify }}" style="width:100%; height:340px; padding:4px 12px 12px;"></div>
44	  <script>
45	  (function(){
46	    const raw = {{ topic_series_json|safe }};
47	    const kpiEl = document.getElementById('topic_chart_kpis_{{ group|slugify }}');
48	    const chartEl = document.getElementById('topic_chart_{{ group|slugify }}');
49	    if (!raw) {
50	      chartEl.innerHTML = '<div style="padding:40px;text-align:center;color:#64748b;">查無歷史資料</div>';
51	      return;
52	    }
53	    // KPI 卡
54	    const fmtPct = (v) => v == null ? '—' : `${v >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${v.toFixed(2)}%`;
55	    const cls = (v) => v == null ? '' : (v > 0 ? 'positive' : (v < 0 ? 'negative' : ''));
56	    kpiEl.innerHTML = `
57	      <div><small>近 1 日漲跌幅</small><strong class="${cls(raw.ret_1d)}">${fmtPct(raw.ret_1d)}</strong></div>
58	      <div><small>近 1 週漲跌幅</small><strong class="${cls(raw.ret_1w)}">${fmtPct(raw.ret_1w)}</strong></div>
59	      <div><small>近 1 月漲跌幅</small><strong class="${cls(raw.ret_1m)}">${fmtPct(raw.ret_1m)}</strong></div>
60	    `;
61	
62	    function start() {
63	      if (typeof echarts === 'undefined') { return setTimeout(start, 120); }
64	      const chart = echarts.init(chartEl, 'dark', { renderer: 'canvas' });
65	      const last = raw.values[raw.values.length - 1];
66	      const isUp = last >= 0;
67	      const mainColor = isUp ? '#ef4444' : '#10b981';  // 台股紅漲綠跌
68	      const fillColorStart = isUp ? 'rgba(239,68,68,0.35)' : 'rgba(16,185,129,0.35)';
69	      const fillColorEnd   = isUp ? 'rgba(239,68,68,0.02)' : 'rgba(16,185,129,0.02)';
70	      chart.setOption({
71	        backgroundColor: 'transparent',
72	        grid: { left: 12, right: 56, top: 20, bottom: 32, containLabel: true },
73	        tooltip: {
74	          trigger: 'axis',
75	          backgroundColor: 'rgba(15,20,28,0.95)',
76	          borderColor: '#374151', borderWidth: 1,
77	          textStyle: { color: '#e5e7eb', fontSize: 13 },
78	          formatter: (p) => {
79	            const x = p[0];
80	            const v = x.value;
81	            const c = v >= 0 ? '#f87171' : '#4ade80';
82	            return `<div style="font-size:11px;color:#9ca3af;margin-bottom:4px;">${x.axisValue}</div>
83	                    <b style="color:${c};font-size:15px;">${v >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${v.toFixed(2)}%</b>`;
84	          }
85	        },
86	        xAxis: {
87	          type: 'category', data: raw.dates,
88	          boundaryGap: false,
89	          axisLine: { lineStyle: { color: '#374151' } },
90	          axisTick: { show: false },
91	          axisLabel: {
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```python
"""一次性 patch: 為 dist/topic/*.html 的成分股表格加上 .table-scroll wrapper，
避免跑整站 rebuild。"""
from pathlib import Path
import re

DIST_TOPIC = Path(__file__).parent / "dist" / "topic"

# 匹配 <h2>成分股清單</h2> 之後第一個 <table class="table">...</table>
PATTERN = re.compile(
    r'(<h2>成分股清單</h2>.*?</div>\s*)(<table class="table">.*?</table>)',
    re.DOTALL,
)

def patch_one(p: Path) -> bool:
    txt = p.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    if 'class="table-scroll"' in txt:
        return False  # 已 patch 過
    new_txt, n = PATTERN.subn(
        r'\1<div class="table-scroll">\2</div>',
        txt,
        count=1,
    )
    if n == 0:
        return False
    p.write_text(new_txt, encoding="utf-8")
    return True

if __name__ == "__main__":
    files = sorted(DIST_TOPIC.glob("*.html"))
    patched = 0
    skipped = 0
    for f in files:
        if patch_one(f):
            patched += 1
        else:
            skipped += 1
    print(f"patched={patched}  skipped={skipped}  total={len(files)}")

```

```text
File created successfully at: C:\Users\user\Desktop\fin ai\族群統計網頁\site\_patch_topic_table.py
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```python
"""一次性 patch: 把全站 '台股產業寶' / '台股 AI 產業寶' / '產業寶' 改成 '族群寶'。
範圍：site/templates/*.html + site/dist/**/*.html + site/build_site.py
"""
from pathlib import Path

SITE = Path(__file__).parent
TARGETS = [
    *SITE.glob("templates/*.html"),
    *SITE.glob("dist/*.html"),
    *SITE.glob("dist/topic/*.html"),
    *SITE.glob("dist/company/*.html"),
    SITE / "build_site.py",
]

# 順序很重要：長字串先替換，避免 '台股產業寶' 變 '台股族群寶'
REPLACEMENTS = [
    ("台股 AI 產業寶", "族群寶"),
    ("台股產業寶",     "族群寶"),
    ("產業寶",          "族群寶"),
]

def patch_one(p: Path) -> int:
    txt = p.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    orig = txt
    for old, new in REPLACEMENTS:
        txt = txt.replace(old, new)
    if txt != orig:
        p.write_text(txt, encoding="utf-8")
        return 1
    return 0

if __name__ == "__main__":
    changed = 0
    for f in TARGETS:
        if not f.exists():
            continue
        changed += patch_one(f)
    print(f"changed={changed}  scanned={len(TARGETS)}")

```

```python
"""一次性 patch:
1. 在 <link rel="stylesheet" href="<prefix>static/style.css"> 之前插入 favicon link
2. 把 <span class="logo-mark">寶</span> 替換成 <img class="logo-mark" src="<prefix>static/logo.png" alt="族群寶 IndusMap">
範圍：site/templates/*.html (非 base 繼承的) + site/dist/**/*.html
"""
from pathlib import Path
import re

SITE = Path(__file__).parent

INDEPENDENT_TEMPLATES = [
    "index.html", "today.html", "topics.html",
    "heatmap.html", "database.html", "ai.html",
    "limit-up.html", "limit_up.html",
]
TEMPLATE_FILES = [SITE / "templates" / n for n in INDEPENDENT_TEMPLATES]
DIST_FILES = [
    *SITE.glob("dist/*.html"),
    *SITE.glob("dist/topic/*.html"),
    *SITE.glob("dist/company/*.html"),
]

# (1) 找 stylesheet 行，從 href 推 prefix
STYLESHEET_RE = re.compile(
    r'(<link rel="stylesheet" href=")((?:[^"]*?))(static/style\.css">)'
)
LOGO_MARK_RE = re.compile(r'<span class="logo-mark">寶</span>')


def patch_one(p: Path) -> int:
    txt = p.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    orig = txt

    # 1) 插入 favicon (避免重複插入)
    if 'rel="icon"' not in txt:
        def insert_favicon(m):
            prefix = m.group(2)
            favicon_lines = (
                f'<link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="{prefix}static/logo.png">\n'
                f'<link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="{prefix}static/logo.png">\n'
            )
            return favicon_lines + m.group(0)
        txt = STYLESHEET_RE.sub(insert_favicon, txt, count=1)

    # 2) 替換 logo-mark
    def replace_logo(_m):
        # 用同一檔案的 stylesheet href 來推 prefix
        sm = STYLESHEET_RE.search(orig)
        prefix = sm.group(2) if sm else ""
        return f'<img class="logo-mark" src="{prefix}static/logo.png" alt="族群寶 IndusMap">'
    txt = LOGO_MARK_RE.sub(replace_logo, txt)

    if txt != orig:
        p.write_text(txt, encoding="utf-8")
        return 1
    return 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    targets = [f for f in (TEMPLATE_FILES + DIST_FILES) if f.exists()]
    changed = 0
    for f in targets:
        changed += patch_one(f)
    print(f"changed={changed}  total={len(targets)}")

```

- **圖片資源**：複製 `網站LOGO.png` 到 `site/static/logo.png` 與 `site/dist/static/logo.png`（避免中文 URL 編碼）

- **favicon**：每頁 head 加 `<link rel="icon" type="image/png" href=".../static/logo.png">` 與 `apple-touch-icon`，瀏覽器分頁與行動裝置桌面圖示都會用這張
- **CSS**：`.logo-mark` 移除漸層底色 / 圓角 / 陰影，改成 44×44 透明背景 `object-fit: contain` 直接顯示圖片
- **dist 同步**：templates 全部 7 個 + dist 中 2928 個 HTML 一次處理完，根據檔案位置自動推導 `static/` vs `../static/` 相對路徑
- **css 同步到 dist/static**，patch script 已刪除

Header 大小選 44px 是平衡：再大會擠壓 nav，再小看不清圖案細節（4 個人物 + 河流）。如果想要更突顯（例如 60px+）或想連同「族群寶」中文字一起拿掉只放 logo，再說。
